reviews.review_description: Important Useful Experience
The dev. Team did an amazing job creating a very realistic enviroment. I love vr!!
I really loved it! Even im not a native english speaker i could feel the atmosphere.Very imersive and touching.I only wish someone open the door at the end ToT
Pretty cool experience

I must say that I am quite surprised by what I experienced with this. What appeared to be a simple little virtual reality experience turned out to be rather powerful as well as educating. This is a perfect example of what virtual reality can do vs any other medium.
A great free experience
This feels exactly like when I went through this. I couldn't make it the whole way through this VR experience.
Awsome amazing thought provoking and original step away from the game world and use your imagination and become the prisoner then you will truly appreciate this marvelouse app

This is such a pity party. Poor criminals being punished. They conviently forgot to mention the part of how criminals get there to begin with. 

This "poor criminal" who probably committed a robbery, rape, murder, or some sort of outrageous crime that landed them in jail. Then they committed another offense in prison to land them in solitary confinement. 

Stop trying to make it seem like prisoners are being bullied around. They're the ones that committed a horrible crime so they need to suck it up and do the time.

Btw before ppl say I'm assuming they committed a terrible act and they might of just did something petty... petty stuff rarely puts you in prison. Most do their time in jail (which most don't have solitary confinement) and they're done and out. Prison is for those that committed a crime bad enough to make the DAs want to give them years of time. AND they probably did something pretty messed up (like shank someone) to land a year in solitary confinement.
Seems interesting, although the audio does not seem to be working right.
Great for putting my child in timeout.
This should keep some people from breaking the law... Hopefully
Interesting.
Visually it was intriguing, however the audio was horrible. It was almost robotic. It took away from the experience.

reviews.review_title: Its ok good knowledge to have
reviews.review_description: I gave it 3 stars as I found it a bit boring I wanted to see someone there watch them come in and able to see what gose on in other inmates rooms but over all just ok
I learned a lot after this
Excellent!!!

reviews.review_title: I will have what Patentguy555 is having
reviews.review_description: I read patentguy555's explanation of how dude may have got into solitary confinement and his horrifying picture of our prison systems and it's fight or die atmosphere leads me to believe he should work with children since children are like felons. Children are verbally and physically abusive and have no qualms about stealing or burning down homes with an entire family trapped inside... Oh the game is good too.

It seems realistic, and of course it seems sad to me, but then again I haven't done anything to deserve being put in jail anyway, most of the people in jail, and then solitary confinement have. I would have to put myself in their mindset beforehand to truly be able to determine if it would have a positive or negative effect on my behavior. I don't support solitary confinement just for the sake of it, but I do think that being confined, but with some way to better yourselves, whether books or educational, inspirational videos, could aid in the self-reflection that should occur with solitude.

Great VR, but unbalanced: no doubt abuse occurs and oversight needed...but NO mention than inmates who violently attack other inmates need to be isolated in such cells to deter future acts.  Also isolation can effect positive change, promote introspection.
